creator: mm@FreeBSD.org
text:
I have submitted a bug report with a suggested patch to OpenBSD.
http://cvs.openbsd.org/cgi-bin/query-pr-wrapper?full=yes&numbers=6627
You can apply the working patch if you want, but they may fix the
problem in a different way.

I have also reported another serious bug (and attached a patch):
http://cvs.openbsd.org/cgi-bin/query-pr-wrapper?full=yes&numbers=6624
-- 

Martin Matuska
FreeBSD committer
http://blog.vx.sk
